name: logbrew/sdk
description: Public LogBrew PHP SDK for building, validating, and flushing event batches.

suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: Required for Guzzle 7 outbound HTTP tracing.
suggest.psr/http-client: Required to wrap an app-owned PSR-18 client.
suggest.psr/http-message: Required for outbound HTTP request and response interfaces.
